title: Custom domain integration other than MS or Gmail

posts.author: arawaks (Bob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello to all,

I am a python developer and I would like to develop an integration that would allow me to link Monday to my hoster to link the mails to monday without going through MS or Gmail.

Can you give me information on how I should start because there is a lot of information to digest related to the use of the monday API.

Thanks in advance

posts.author: PROform1 (Gretchen Jackman)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there no answer to this question?? I am quickly becoming enamoured of this Monday…thing… but my company email is neither gmail nor outlook. If I cannot connect it, this is a crushing deal breaker!! Please save me from the other guys!!

posts.author: jsellers (Jonathan)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed 100% that this feature is vital to professional web development. It’s foundational to branding, privacy, and control. It is actually mind-bending that this feature is not here in 2025 over four years later since you bring up this fundamental flaw in the system.
